name: bash
description: Execute shell commands directly in bash.

name: save_and_test
description: Save current changes as patch and run correctness + benchmark tests. Use this after implementing optimizations to verify correctness and measure performance. The system will automatically save your changes, run the configured test command (SETUP + CORRECTNESS + BENCHMARK), and report results.

description.description: Brief description of what optimization is being tested (e.g., 'baseline', 'memory coalescing', 'vectorization')

name: submit
description: Submit the final optimized implementation and complete the task. Use this when you are satisfied with your optimization results. After calling this, you cannot continue working on the task.

summary.description: Summary of the optimizations made and their performance impact.

name: str_replace_editor
description: File editor for viewing, creating, and editing files. Commands: view (view file content), create (create new file), str_replace (replace text), insert (insert text at line).

view_range.description: Line range [start, end] to view. Optional for: view.

old_str.description: Text to be replaced. Required for: str_replace.

new_str.description: Replacement text. Required for: str_replace, insert.

insert_line.description: Line number to insert at. Required for: insert.

name: strategy_manager
description: Manage optimization strategies. Commands: create (initialize strategy list), show (view strategies), next (get next pending strategy), mark (update status), add (add new strategy), remove (skip/delete strategy), update (modify strategy), note (add note), summary (show statistics).

index.description: Strategy index (1-based). Required for: mark, remove, update. Optional for: show.

status.description: Strategy status. Required for: mark. Optional for: update.

result.description: Result description (e.g., '+21.1% improvement'). Optional for: mark, update.

details.description: Additional details or log file path. Optional for: mark, update.

baseline_metrics.description: Baseline metrics in 'Key:Value' format. Required for: create.

baseline_log.description: Path to baseline benchmark log. Optional for: create.

strategies.description: Initial strategies in 'Name|Description|Expected|Target' format. Optional for: create.

method.description: Remove method. Default: skip. For: remove.

name: profile_kernel
description: Profile a GPU kernel using Metrix (structured JSON) or rocprof-compute (deep roofline analysis). Set backend='metrix' for bottleneck classification with hardware metrics, or backend='rocprof-compute' for detailed instruction mix and cache analysis.

command.description: Command to execute for profiling (e.g. 'python3 kernel.py --profile')

profiling_type.description: Profiling depth for rocprof-compute. Default: profiling

quick.description: Quick profile with fewer metrics (metrix only). Default: false

name: generate_optimization
description: Generate an optimized kernel variant using LLM-guided kernel evolution. Targets a specific bottleneck type.

kernel_code.description: The kernel source code to optimize

name: evaluate_kernel_quality
description: Evaluate a GPU kernel across AMD GPU optimization criteria. Returns scores and suggestions.

kernel_code.description: The kernel source code to evaluate

name: reflect_on_kernel_result
description: Analyze kernel test results and suggest next optimization steps.

test_output.description: Output from running the kernel test/benchmark

name: resolve_kernel_url
description: Resolve a GitHub kernel URL to a local file path, line number, and kernel function name. Clones the repo if needed.

workspace.description: Directory to clone into (default: current directory)

name: baseline_metrics
description: Format profiler output into baseline_metrics.json for OpenEvolve. Takes profiler JSON output and selected kernel names/indices.

profiler_output.description: JSON string from profiler-mcp profile_kernel output

output_path.description: File path to write the baseline_metrics.json

name: check_kernel_compatibility
description: Scan kernel code for CUDA-only patterns that are incompatible with AMD GPUs. Returns a list of issues found with suggested AMD/ROCm alternatives.

kernel_code.description: Kernel source code as a string

file_path.description: Path to kernel file (used if kernel_code not provided)

name: sub_agent
description: Spawn a child agent to perform a focused sub-task. The child runs independently with its own step/cost budget and returns the result. Use for algorithm rewrites, cross-file edits, or any task that benefits from dedicated agent reasoning. For substantial rewrites, keep step_limit at 150 or higher and leave cost_limit at 0.0 so the dollar cap does not stop the child first.

task.description: The sub-task description for the child agent

step_limit.description: Max steps for the child agent (default: 150, minimum enforced: 150)

cost_limit.description: Max cost in dollars for the child agent (default: 0.0 / disabled; use only when you intentionally want an extra cap)

system_prompt.description: Override the child agent's system prompt (optional)
